title: Business data use and productivity study
body: "The data use and productivity study is a telephone and online-based study that explores data use in individual UK businesses and at the economy-wide level, to better understand the data-related activities and attitudes towards data that promote higher productivity and growth.  The study is based on a longitudinal survey that asks businesses about the amount of money and time they invest in data assets, in addition to their data-related skills and activities.  Further information  For queries about data use and productivity statistics, please contact ukbusinessdatasurvey@dsit.gov.uk.  For media enquiries only please contact the DSIT press office:   Email press@dsit.gov.uk Monday to Friday, 8:30am to 6pm 020 7215 3000   The press office phone number and inbox is monitored at all hours. "
